title: carphalea glaucescens
intro: Carphalea glaucescens, also known as the 'Grey-leaved Carphalea', is a plant species belonging to the family Rubiaceae. Traditionally, Carphalea glaucescens has been used in herbal medicine, primarily due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant's health benefits are said to include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating various gastrointestinal issues. Carphalea glaucescens is typically prepared as a decoction or a tincture, and it is also used as a component in various herbal blends.
